text: All remaining P1 pre-launch tests MUST be completed without pausing for owner input between tests
The configuration wizard MUST be removed from the admin UI
Test mode MUST be removed from the admin UI
The configuration system MUST use a Save-then-Activate model where changes are saved but not active until explicitly activated
Four configuration pages (Agent Config, Knowledge Base, Quick Actions, Widget Config) MUST use SAVED to ACTIVATED state transitions
The Activate option MUST only appear when there are unapplied (saved but not yet activated) changes
The Restore option MUST reverse all saved-but-not-activated changes back to the prior known activated state
Activation MUST apply all three configurable pages (Agent Config, KB, Quick Actions) together as a single atomic action
Restore MUST revert all three configurable pages together as a single atomic action
A configuration state check MUST run before activation and fail with an error if the configuration is not sufficiently complete
Option B approved: configuration snapshots MUST be stored immediately; history UI is deferred to a future release
WI #63 (tenant-scoped configuration system) approved for implementation
WI #64 (configuration validation layer) approved for implementation
WI #65 (configuration migration system) approved for implementation
WI #29 (secrets management via Azure Key Vault) approved for implementation
WI #47 (KEDA autoscaling) approved for implementation
WI #48 (Terraform infrastructure-as-code) approved for implementation
WI #83-88 (persistent memory system: conversation memory, entity extraction, context window, memory privacy, memory search, cross-conversation learning) approved for implementation
WI #52 (horizontal pod autoscaling) approved for implementation
WI #55 (monitoring and alerting) approved for implementation
WI #58 (CI/CD pipeline) approved for implementation
WI #59 (blue-green deployment) approved for implementation
WI #77 (API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger) approved for implementation
WI #78 (SLA monitoring and reporting) approved for implementation
100% of admin interfaces MUST be tested
100% of all admin/configuration options MUST be tested
Multi-tenant scale, security, and failure mode scenarios MUST be tested
Adversarial testing MUST be performed in the production environment
A demo/tryout environment MUST be provided for customers before subscription purchase
All newly identified tests from the coverage audit MUST be added to the comprehensive test plan
All newly identified work items from the coverage report MUST be enumerated and added to the backlog
The Shopify embedded admin and the standalone admin MUST be functionally equivalent — every feature available in one shell MUST be available in the other
Every admin UI element MUST have a mouseover tooltip with a brief explanation of the element's purpose
Every tooltip MUST include a link to the relevant documentation page that opens in a new browser tab
WI #226 (tooltips with documentation links) approved for implementation
Claude is delegated priority choice for WI #209-225 (RAG infrastructure) implementation order
Shopify merchant category images MUST be included for marketing purposes
A security assessment of the local development environment MUST be performed
The standalone admin console MUST include links to product documentation
The standalone admin sticky navbar MUST display the merchant's Shopify storefront name
The standalone admin sticky navbar MUST include a link to the merchant's Shopify storefront
The Shopify embedded admin MUST include a cross-navigation link to the standalone admin console
Documentation links MUST be included in the Shopify app submission materials
The widget 'Powered by Agent Red' link MUST point to agentredcx.com (not remakerdigital.com)
The Inbox page MUST be a read-only transcript viewer — chat input MUST be removed entirely
Escalation agents MUST have read-only access to the Inbox page
The 4-role architecture MUST be implemented: superadmin, admin, escalation_agent, viewer
The superadmin role MUST be hidden from the team management UI and cannot be deleted
The admin role MUST have full access to all admin features
The viewer role MUST have read-only access to all admin pages
Option C approved: per-user API key authentication model where each API key is linked to an approved team member email address
Team members MUST NOT be able to change their own email addresses — email is an admin-controlled identity field
A whoami endpoint MUST be implemented to return the authenticated user's identity and role
Nine default escalation keywords MUST be pre-configured for new tenants
Integration card logos MUST use a 180x180 pixel square container
Integration card logo images MUST fill the container naturally with no explicit size constraints on the img element
All interactive buttons in the admin UI MUST have visible hover states
Every tooltip MUST contain brief descriptive text AND a link to the corresponding documentation page with an anchor to the relevant section
The Dashboard page MUST NOT have an All/Production/Test environment selector control
The sidebar logo MUST have separate dark mode and light mode variants
The light mode sidebar logo MUST use NEW-BLOCK-LOGO-HORIZONTAL-LIGHT.svg
The dark mode sidebar logo MUST use NEW-BLOCK-LOGO-HORIZONTAL-DARK.svg
Dark mode page background color MUST be #141414
Dark mode card/surface background color MUST be #1f1f1f
Dark mode card border color MUST be #272727
Dark mode header and sidebar background color MUST be #0a0a0a
Table row borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Input and selection field borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Section heading underlines MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Grey button borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Accordion and expander borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Inbox pane backgrounds MUST use the sidebar background color (#0a0a0a)
Search field borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
RAG lookup tag borders MUST use the standard box border color (#272727)
Chat bubble grey background MUST use the sidebar active-page highlight color
Highlighted/selected conversation row background MUST use the sidebar active-page highlight color
The Remaker Digital logo contains its own wordmark — no separate text label MUST be rendered next to the logo
The sidebar logo MUST render in its natural colors with no CSS filter applied
Dark mode color hierarchy MUST follow: chrome #0a0a0a (darkest) -> page #141414 -> surface #1f1f1f -> border #272727 (lightest dark element)
All Mantine component borders MUST be standardized to the same border color (#272727) for visual consistency
WI #209 (KB vectorization and embedding pipeline) approved for implementation
WI #210 (document upload support for PDF, DOCX, CSV, and URL sources) approved for implementation
WI #211 (hybrid BM25 plus vector retrieval for knowledge base queries) approved for implementation
WI #212 (KB document staleness management and re-indexing) approved for implementation
WI #213 (semantic caching for repeated knowledge base queries) approved for implementation
The escalation_agent role MUST be restricted to read-only Inbox access only — no access to configuration, team, or settings pages
Per-user API keys MUST follow the format ar_user_* with the key cryptographically linked to a specific team member email
Grey buttons in the admin UI MUST use the standard box border color (#272727) for their border
The Save button MUST persist configuration changes to storage without making them live
The Activate button MUST make previously saved configuration changes live and active for the widget
Widget Config page MUST also participate in the Save-then-Activate state model alongside Agent Config, KB, and Quick Actions
